_meta.session: BMT batch 1 — Priority 4 CTI knowledge. Both CTI-Bench (NeurIPS 2024) and CyberMetric (IEEE CSR 2024) tested only pre-frontier models (ChatGPT-3.5, ChatGPT-4, Gemini-1.5, LLAMA3). No frontier 2026 scores published. Metadata registered.

benchmarks.name: CTI-Bench
benchmarks.description: 5,610 cyber threat intelligence tasks (attribution, severity, MITRE mapping, knowledge). NeurIPS 2024.

benchmarks.name: CyberMetric
benchmarks.description: TII Falcon team: 10,000 cybersecurity knowledge MCQs drawn from NIST/ISO standards and certifications. IEEE CSR 2024.
